groups.name: nova.observability
groups.description: Configuración del starter de observabilidad Nova Platform.

groups.name: nova.observability.otlp
groups.description: Configuración del exportador OTLP hacia el OpenTelemetry Collector.

groups.name: nova.observability.metrics.golden-signals
groups.description: Configuración de las métricas Four Golden Signals.

groups.name: nova.observability.filter
groups.description: Configuración del filtro HTTP de métricas.

properties.name: nova.observability.enabled
properties.description: Activa o desactiva toda la observabilidad del starter.

properties.name: nova.observability.otlp.endpoint
properties.description: Endpoint del OpenTelemetry Collector para exportación OTLP.

properties.name: nova.observability.otlp.protocol
properties.description: Protocolo de exportación OTLP (http/protobuf o grpc).

properties.name: nova.observability.metrics.enabled
properties.description: Activa o desactiva las métricas de observabilidad.

properties.name: nova.observability.metrics.golden-signals.enabled
properties.description: Activa o desactiva el registro de Four Golden Signals.

properties.name: nova.observability.traces.enabled
properties.description: Activa o desactiva las trazas distribuidas.

properties.name: nova.observability.traces.sampling-ratio
properties.description: Ratio de sampling de trazas (0.0 a 1.0). 1.0 significa todas las trazas.

properties.name: nova.observability.logs.enabled
properties.description: Activa o desactiva la correlación de logs con traceId/spanId.

properties.name: nova.observability.logs.export-to-otlp
properties.description: Exportar logs al Collector vía OTLP.

properties.name: nova.observability.filter.exclude-paths
properties.description: Lista de rutas excluidas del registro de métricas del filtro HTTP.

properties.name: nova.observability.filter.normalize-ids
properties.description: Normalizar IDs en URIs usando path patterns de Spring MVC.
